description: Constructed in a nearly seamless style with dynamic support, the nike LunarHaze+ men's running shoe stands apart from the other shoes in the nike Stable Ride collection. It has an innovate and nearly seamless upper that delivers an increadibly lightweight and ventilated feel. Works best for overpronators and moderate overpronators, the Nike LunarHaze+ offers excellent flexibility and smooth transition, powering your strides.Upper Mesh layered upper for ample breathability Nearly seamless, one-piece upper to protect the feet from irritation and blistering Hyperfuse lattice work that fuses mesh and synthetic material to render a lightweight, strong, durable, springy and supportive ride Meshed inner sleeve to wrap the foot for a plush, breathable Fit and feel Reflective elements embeded to make running in low light conditions safe Midsole Lunarlon cushioning for a soft, more resilient and springy ride Dynamic support for enhanced stability and to adapt to every runner's stride Foam core encased in a foam carrier for extra shock absorption Crash pad beneath the heel made of softer foam for enhanced shock absorption, protecting the feet from impact Outsole Made of mixed rubbers with a waffle pattern for enhanced durability and traction Flex grooves along the length and width of the midsole and outsole for flexibility and smooth heel to toe transition   Wash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
